creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Wed, Sep 15, 2010 at 08:03:29AM +0000, Bernhard Froehlich wrote:
> Thank you very much for your work! It looks fine to me now.

By the way, may be it will worth to put bsd.redmine.mk into
/usr/ports/Mk?  It might be easier for people to locate this file and
use it for plugins.

I can do the needed modifications to bsd.port.mk to add USE_REDMINE knob
and associated stuff if the consensus will be that such modifications
will be worthwile.
-- 
Eygene
